## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Catalog addition (new parts)
- [ ] Compatibility rule
- [ ] New preset
- [ ] Docs / examples

## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] If adding parts: catalog quality tests pass and every new part has `data_source`
- [ ] No mil / CUI / customer-identifying language (see CONTRIBUTING.md scope)
- [ ] README / CHANGELOG updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Commit messages use Conventional Commits (`feat:` / `fix:` / `docs:` / etc.)
